C

changeLightbulb(int, LightBulb) - Method in class LightString
replace the n-th lightbulb of the light string by the given lightbulb.

G

getColor() - Method in class LightBulb
get the color of the bulb
getConsumedPower() - Method in class LightString
provides as a result the total power expressed in Watts consumed by the bulbs in the string.
getLightBulb() - Method in class LightSwitch
access the bulb controlled by the switch.
getLightBulb(int) - Method in class LightString
we want to have a getLightBulb() method that allows us to obtain the i th bulb in the string
getLumen() - Method in class LightBulb
get the lumens of the bulb
getWatt() - Method in class LightBulb
get the power of the bulb in watts

I

isOn() - Method in class LightBulb
know if a bulb is on or off

L

LightBulb - Class in Unnamed Package
definition of the bulb class
LightBulb(int, int, String) - Constructor for class LightBulb
the constructor of the light bulb class
LightMain - Class in Unnamed Package
main program for the light class
LightMain() - Constructor for class LightMain
 
LightString - Class in Unnamed Package
We want to create a LightString class to model such garlands.
LightString(int) - Constructor for class LightString
constructor of the LightString class
LightSwitch - Class in Unnamed Package
LightSwitch, whose objects represent electrical switches that control the switching on and off of a given (and only one) light bulb.
LightSwitch(LightBulb) - Constructor for class LightSwitch
the constructor of the switch class

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class LightMain
Main method that starts the application.

P

push() - Method in class LightSwitch
press the switch, which changes the state of the bulb (on or off).

T

toString() - Method in class LightBulb
a string description of a light bulb The on or off status of the bulb is mentioned by this description
turnOff() - Method in class LightBulb
turn this bulb off
turnOff() - Method in class LightString
a method of turning off a light bulb
turnOn() - Method in class LightBulb
turn on this bulb
turnOn() - Method in class LightString
allows you to light a garland
